jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Jetking - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Jetking, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jetking:
Jetking is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jetking!
